title: Deep Fried Turkish Pasta
description: A roasted, shaggy, one-pot Turkish dish featuring bowtie pasta, deep-fried to a crispy perfection, Whole30-friendly and served on a bamboo tray.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the bowtie pasta according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, whisk together the turkish spice blend, salt, and black pepper.
Add the cooked pasta, sauteed onion and garlic, and eggs to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Divide the mixture into 6 equal portions and shape each portion into a small rectangle.
Dip each rectangle into the almond flour, coating both sides evenly.
Heat the avocado oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
Deep fry the coated pasta rectangles for 3-4 minutes on each side, until golden brown.
Remove the fried pasta from the oil and place on a bamboo tray lined with paper towels to drain excess oil.
